name: Stable Diffusion WebUI (A1111) — image generation
description: The classic AUTOMATIC1111 web UI for Stable Diffusion / SDXL: txt2img, img2img, inpainting, upscaling, extensions and a built-in model browser. Serves on port 7860 — open the returned URL in a browser. No models ship in the image; download checkpoints from the UI or set HF_TOKEN / CIVITAI_TOKEN for gated downloads. Needs ~8 GB VRAM for SDXL.

requiredResources.description: CUDA GPU; ~8 GB VRAM for SDXL, more for large models
